query:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS "total!: i64"
            FROM activity_log
            WHERE (?1 IS NULL OR source_id = ?1)
              AND (?2 IS NULL OR ts >= ?2)
              AND (?3 IS NULL OR ts <  ?3)
              AND (?4 IS NULL OR CASE level
                                    WHEN 'info'  THEN 0
                                    WHEN 'warn'  THEN 1
                                    WHEN 'error' THEN 2
                                    ELSE -1
                                 END >= ?4)
